positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a soaring celestial whale diving through a bioluminescent nebula. The whale has flowing, ethereal fins patterned with constellations, and emits soft, glowing cyan and magenta light. Surrounded by exotic flora made of glowing jellyfish and crystalline structures. Deep space elements mingle with dreamy, tropical undertones. Highly detailed line work, negative space emphasized, clean silhouette, strong contrast between the glowing subject and the dark background. Flat graphic novel aesthetic with gradient color pop. Central composition, designed for apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, photo, realism, 3d render, logo, brand, copyright, celebrity, trademark
